leadership.name: Mr. Salim Khan
leadership.message: At Sajj Global School, we nurture not just academic excellence but the complete human being — a young person of curiosity, integrity, and compassion. Kolkata is a city of culture, intellect, and resilience, and our school is built on those very foundations. Every child who walks through these gates carries the potential to shape a better Bengal and a better India. Our commitment is simply this: to give them every possible tool to do so.
leadership.shortBio: A visionary leader and driving force behind the Sajj Global Foundation, Mr. Salim Khan has championed quality education as a fundamental right for over two decades, with deep roots in West Bengal's educational landscape.

leadership.name: Dr. Chandana Bhattacharya
leadership.message: Kolkata has always been a city that celebrates learning, art, and human connection — and Sajj Global School is proud to be part of that tradition. Education is the greatest equaliser. At SGS, we believe every child is gifted — our role is to discover that gift, cultivate it with care, and send them into the world with confidence, empathy, and a lifelong love for learning. I am proud of every student, every teacher, and every family that makes this community extraordinary.
leadership.shortBio: With over 24 years in education and a deep connection to Bengal's rich literary and cultural heritage, Dr. Chandana Bhattacharya has led SGS through its most transformative period of academic growth and community engagement.
